Process

HOW IT WORKS

Three steps. No technical knowledge needed. No ongoing maintenance.

01
Step 01

Unbox & Power Up

Arrives ready to go. Plug in, power on. Connects to WiFi via a one-time mobile setup — no router configuration required.

02
Step 02

Link Your Account

Connect Instagram in under 2 minutes via secure web app. No password required — uses official read-only API access.

03
Step 03

Watch It Grow

Place AERA on your counter. Every new follower updates live. Customers see growth happening — and want to be part of it.

Questions

ASKED & ANSWERED

What is the 1-month free trial?
+
Every AERA unit ships with a full 1-month free trial included. No credit card required at sign-up. Full live follower counter functionality from day one, completely free.
What platforms does it support?
+
Launch supports Instagram. TikTok, YouTube, and Twitter/X integration are on the roadmap and will be available via firmware update to all existing units at no cost.
How often does the count update?
+
Default is every 60 seconds. Configurable through the AERA app — set it to refresh more or less frequently depending on your preference.
Is my Instagram account safe?
+
Absolutely. AERA uses Instagram's official API with read-only access. We never ask for your password and your credentials are never stored on device or our servers.
When will my unit ship?
+
Queue members are fulfilled in order of sign-up. You will receive your position number immediately on joining, and we will keep you updated on shipping timelines via email.
